channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7376] sanity-hsm test_59 test failed divide error: 0000 [#1] SMP RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffa0d0ed74>] [<ffffffffa0d0ed74>] lod_declare_striped_object+0x4d4/0x940 [lod]
item.description:
691 <4>Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-hsm test 59: Release stripeless file with non-zero size == 02:32:13 (1446345133)
692 <4>divide error: 0000 [#1] SMP$
693 <4>last sysfs file: /sys/devices/system/cpu/online
694 <4>CPU 1$
695 <4>Modules linked in: osp(U) mdd(U) lfsck(U) lod(U) mdt(U) mgs(U) mgc(U) osd_ldiskfs(U) lquota(U) lustre(U) lov(U) mdc(U) fid(U) fld(U) ksocklnd(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lnet(U)     sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) ldiskfs(U) nfs lockd fscache auth_rpcgss nfs_acl sunrpc ipt_REJECT ip6t_REJECT nf_conntrack_ipv6 nf_defrag_ipv6 xt_state nf_conntrack ip    6table_filter ip6_tables ipv6 virtio_balloon virtio_net i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext4 jbd2 mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm    _region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: nf_defrag_ipv4]
696 <4>
697 <4>Pid: 6084, comm: mdt_rdpg00_000 Not tainted 2.6.32-431.17.1.x2.0.69.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
698 <4>RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffa0d0ed74>]  [<ffffffffa0d0ed74>] lod_declare_striped_object+0x4d4/0x940 [lod]
699 <4>RSP: 0018:ffff88010c25da60  EFLAGS: 00010246

714 <4><d> ffffffffa0d9c2c2 0000000000000002 ffff88010c25db10 ffffffffa0d0f9c0
715 <4>Call Trace:
716 <4> [<ffffffffa0d0f9c0>] lod_declare_xattr_set+0x2d0/0x4e0 [lod]
717 <4> [<ffffffffa0d8d98f>] mdd_declare_xattr_set+0x8f/0x260 [mdd]
718 <4> [<ffffffffa0d8c53c>] ? mdo_xattr_get+0xac/0x1c0 [mdd]

720 <4> [<ffffffffa0d99c8d>] ? mdd_trans_stop+0x1d/0xe6 [mdd]

725 <4> [<ffffffffa06af57a>] ptlrpc_main+0xd7a/0x1880 [ptlrpc]
726 <4> [<ffffffffa06ae800>] ? ptlrpc_main+0x0/0x1880 [ptlrpc]

731 <4>Code: e6 4c 89 ef ff 50 28 e9 39 ff ff ff 8b 4b 44 48 89 f0 31 d2 0f b7 7b 40 49 c7 86 18 01 00 00 08 00 00 00 48 f7 f1 48 89 d6 31 d2 <48> f7 f7 48 0f af c1 48 01 c6 49 89 b    6 d0 00 00 00 48 8b 43 58$
732 <1>RIP  [<ffffffffa0d0ed74>] lod_declare_striped_object+0x4d4/0x940 [lod]

stdout.log


== sanity-hsm test 59: Release stripeless file with non-zero size == 02:32:13 (1446345133)
Only wakeup running copytool agt1 on fre1320
fre1320: 13560
Copytool still running on fre1320
fre1320: 13560
Copytool still running on fre1320
fre1320: 13560
Copytool still running on fre1320
fre1320: 13560
Copytool still running on fre1320

Test introduced by

commit 7a6b48c2f97f165b4449f6283e313cfa33aea5a1
Author:     Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
AuthorDate: Wed Oct 7 11:21:03 2015 +0300
Commit:     Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
CommitDate: Wed Oct 28 13:51:57 2015 +0000

    LU-7186 lod: do not propagate size if stripeless
    
    if a file has no stripes, but the size isn't zero,
    then do not try to propagate this size to stripes.
    
    Change-Id: I25401bcc41e3ea84a2b9158120f1e907af47fafa
    Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
    Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16743
    Reviewed-by: Frank Zago <fzago@cray.com>
    Tested-by: Jenkins
    Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
    Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
    Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
item.environment:
Configuration : 4 node - 1 MDS/ 1OSS / 2 clients
Server 2.5.x
Client 2.7.62
item.summary: sanity-hsm test_59 test failed divide error: 0000 [#1] SMP RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffa0d0ed74>] [<ffffffffa0d0ed74>] lod_declare_striped_object+0x4d4/0x940 [lod]

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch http://review.whamcloud.com/17029/
Subject: LU-7376 tests: sanity-hsm/59 should skip old servers.
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 85249944686732af327a5bfaa25ff2a4098421e8

Alex Zhuravlev (alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: http://review.whamcloud.com/17029
Subject: LU-7376 tests: sanity-hsm/59 should skip old servers.
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 36b42104afce1773d4a0b685dacc7dc2f09bd87e
